ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size standard */,
  "bust" TEXT /* Bust measurement in inches and centimeters */,
  "waist" TEXT /* Waist measurement in inches and centimeters */,
  "hip" TEXT /* Hip measurement in inches and centimeters */,
  "size_label" TEXT /* Standard size label (e.g., XXS, XS, S, M, L) */,
  "measurement_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for bust, waist, and hip (e.g., inches, centimeters) */,
  "size_category" TEXT /* Category of size (e.g., tops, bottoms, dresses) */,
  "size_type" TEXT /* Type of size (e.g., standard, plus, petite) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_standards" (
  "standard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size standard entry */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region of the size standard (e.g., USA, UK, FR) */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size from the sizes table */,
  "us_size" INTEGER /* Corresponding size in USA standards */,
  "uk_size" INTEGER /* Corresponding size in UK standards */,
  "fr_size" INTEGER /* Corresponding size in French standards */,
  "de_size" INTEGER /* Corresponding size in German standards */,
  "eur_size" INTEGER /* Corresponding size in European standards */,
  "aus_size" INTEGER /* Corresponding size in Australian standards */,
  "standard_name" TEXT /* Descriptive name of the size standard */,
  "standard_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the size standard */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("standard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_standards_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the customer */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "joined_date" TEXT /* Date the customer joined the platform */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the customer */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Weight of the customer */,
  "measurement_preferences" TEXT /* Preferred measurement units of the customer (e.g., inches, centimeters) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement entry */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer submitting measurements */,
  "bust" TEXT /* Bust measurement provided by the customer */,
  "waist" TEXT /* Waist measurement provided by the customer */,
  "hip" TEXT /* Hip measurement provided by the customer */,
  "date_submitted" TEXT /* Date when the measurements were submitted */,
  "measurement_status" TEXT /* Status of the measurements (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "measurement_comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes related to customer measurements */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_measurements_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fit_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer providing feedback */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size from the sizes table */,
  "fit_rating" INTEGER /* Fit rating provided by the customer (e.g., 1 to 5) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments provided by the customer regarding the fit */,
  "date_received" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was received */,
  "fit_issue" TEXT /* Specific fit issue reported by the customer (e.g., too tight, too loose) */,
  "fit_suggestion" TEXT /* Suggestions for improving the fit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fit_feedback_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fit_feedback_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory item */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the clothing item */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size from the sizes table */,
  "quantity_available" INTEGER /* Quantity available in stock */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the item */,
  "product_category" TEXT /* Category of the product (e.g., tops, bottoms, dresses) */,
  "product_subcategory" TEXT /* Subcategory of the product */,
  "inventory_status" TEXT /* Status of the inventory (e.g., in stock, out of stock) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation entry */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer receiving the recommendation */,
  "recommended_size_id" INTEGER /* Recommended size from the sizes table */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the recommendation (0-1) */,
  "date_generated" TEXT /* Date when the recommendation was generated */,
  "recommendation_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the size recommendation */,
  "recommendation_confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the recommendation (in percentage) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_recommendations_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_recommendations_recommended_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("recommended_size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)
